Sitharaman dismissed claims that PM Modi undermined the GST Council and emphasized his commitment to pro-people reforms.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/gst-revamp-fm-sitharaman-slams-congress-over-ill-informed-criticism-india-needs-better-opposition/articleshow/123735167.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/gst-revamp-fm-sitharaman-slams-congress-over-ill-informed-criticism-india-needs-better-opposition/articleshow/123735167.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 17:27:29 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="140276" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123735167,imgsize-140276.cms"/></item><item><title>Gold surges to record high: October futures hit Rs 1.07 lakh on MCX — time to invest?</title><description><![CDATA[Gold futures have surged to a record high of Rs 1,07,807 per 10 grams on the MCX, driven by global economic uncertainty and central bank purchases. Anticipated Federal Reserve rate cuts and ongoing tariff concerns are fueling safe-haven demand. Analysts remain optimistic, noting key support levels that could lead to further gains.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/gold-surges-to-record-high-october-futures-hit-rs-1-07-lakh-on-mcx-time-to-invest/articleshow/123733106.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/gold-surges-to-record-high-october-futures-hit-rs-1-07-lakh-on-mcx-time-to-invest/articleshow/123733106.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 14:43:05 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="130991" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123733169,imgsize-130991.cms"/></item><item><title>“It’s just emotional”: Gisele Bündchen teared up reflecting on her younger self, &Tom Brady</title><description><![CDATA[Gisele Bündchen, reflecting on her early career at a business conference in Brazil, became emotional recalling leaving her family at 14 to pursue modeling. This sacrifice continues to influence her perspective as she embraces a new chapter post-divorce from Tom Brady. Bündchen emphasizes self-belief and creating a better world for her children, showcasing resilience beyond her supermodel status.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/its-just-emotional-gisele-bndchen-teared-up-in-brazil-reflecting-on-her-younger-self-and-moving-on-from-tom-brady/articleshow/123655558.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/its-just-emotional-gisele-bndchen-teared-up-in-brazil-reflecting-on-her-younger-self-and-moving-on-from-tom-brady/articleshow/123655558.cms</guid><pubDate>Wed, 03 Sep 2025 04:31:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="45052" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123657637,imgsize-45052.cms"/></item><item><title>Mallya, Nirav Modi & others to be extradited soon? UK team inspects Tihar jail</title><description><![CDATA[A British team recently visited Tihar Jail in New Delhi. This inspection is part of India's effort to bring back fugitives from the UK. The team assessed conditions for individuals like Vijay Mallya and Nirav Modi. India assured safe housing and fair treatment. Extradition requests are pending, including those of arms dealers. India emphasizes humane conditions in its jails.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/uk-team-inspects-tihar-india-offers-special-enclave-plan-for-fugitives-focus-on-nirav-modi-mallya/articleshow/123733599.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/uk-team-inspects-tihar-india-offers-special-enclave-plan-for-fugitives-focus-on-nirav-modi-mallya/articleshow/123733599.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 15:25:31 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="899081" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123733665,imgsize-899081.cms"/></item><item><title>'Wanted to settle score': Why Noida man sent fake bomb threat; cops reveal details</title><description><![CDATA[A Noida resident, Ashwani Kumar, has been apprehended for sending a false threat to Mumbai Police, claiming 14 terrorists entered the city with explosives. Kumar, posing as an astrologer, aimed to frame a friend who had previously filed a case against him, leading to his imprisonment. The hoax message triggered a high alert in Mumbai ahead of Anant Chaturthi celebrations.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/noida/friend-turned-foe-man-held-over-fake-terror-threat-to-mumbai-wanted-to-settle-personal-score/articleshow/123733050.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/noida/friend-turned-foe-man-held-over-fake-terror-threat-to-mumbai-wanted-to-settle-personal-score/articleshow/123733050.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 14:30:20 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI CITY DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="19884" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123733189,imgsize-19884.cms"/></item><item><title>After Xavier Worthy injury, Chiefs could sign Super Bowl champion WR eying offense</title><description><![CDATA[Xavier Worthy's early injury in the Chiefs' opening game against the Chargers has cast a shadow over their season start. The rookie receiver's collision with Travis Kelce raises concerns about the team's receiving depth. With Worthy's availability uncertain, speculation arises about potential replacements, including veteran Odell Beckham Jr., who was present at the game.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/after-xavier-worthy-injury-chiefs-could-sign-proven-super-bowl-champion-wr-to-strengthen-offense/articleshow/123732207.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/after-xavier-worthy-injury-chiefs-could-sign-proven-super-bowl-champion-wr-to-strengthen-offense/articleshow/123732207.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 14:35:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SUBRAT MUKHARJEE</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="26066" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123732275,imgsize-26066.cms"/></item><item><title>India A squad vs Australia A: Shreyas Iyer named captain</title><description><![CDATA[Shreyas Iyer will captain the 15-member India A squad against Australia A in Lucknow, with Dhruv Jurel as vice-captain. The series starts September 16. KL Rahul and Mohammed Siraj will join the squad for the second match beginning September 23.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/india-a-squad-vs-australia-a-shreyas-iyer-named-captain-for-multi-day-matches-in-lucknow/articleshow/123733207.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/india-a-squad-vs-australia-a-shreyas-iyer-named-captain-for-multi-day-matches-in-lucknow/articleshow/123733207.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 14:44:11 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="31424" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123733190,imgsize-31424.cms"/></item><item><title>Manny Pacquiao net worth in 2025: Breaking down his boxing, endorsements, politics income</title><description><![CDATA[Manny Pacquiao, by 2025, amassed a $220 million fortune through boxing, endorsements, and strategic business ventures. His boxing career, highlighted by a $575 million earning and a lucrative Mayweather fight, significantly fueled his wealth. Endorsements with major brands like Nike and ventures such as Manny Pacquiao Promotions further amplified his financial success.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/manny-pacquiao-net-worth-in-2025-breaking-down-his-boxing-endorsements-and-politics-income/articleshow/123701495.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/manny-pacquiao-net-worth-in-2025-breaking-down-his-boxing-endorsements-and-politics-income/articleshow/123701495.cms</guid><pubDate>Thu, 04 Sep 2025 23:00:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="709866" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123701478,imgsize-709866.cms"/></item><item><title>'Cute hypocrisy': Navarro fact-checked on X over remarks on India's Russian oil imports</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/cute-hypocrisy-peter-navarro-fact-checked-on-x-over-remarks-on-indias-russian-oil-imports-users-add-context/articleshow/123733236.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/cute-hypocrisy-peter-navarro-fact-checked-on-x-over-remarks-on-indias-russian-oil-imports-users-add-context/articleshow/123733236.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 15:17:30 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="506516" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123733494,imgsize-506516.cms"/></item><item><title>‘GST mein kuch kaam kariye’: FM recalls PM Modi’s words; focus was on ensuring ease of compliance</title><description><![CDATA[GST rates have been rationalized on numerous items, significantly reducing the number of slabs and altering procedures. The Finance Minister emphasized a user-centric approach, considering daily use, aspirations, and the needs of farmers and MSMEs. These changes aim to ease compliance, boost consumption, and foster economic growth, while addressing concerns from states and exporters.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/pm-called-me-and-said-gst-mein-kuch-kaam-kariye-ensure-ease-of-compliance/articleshow/123730545.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/pm-called-me-and-said-gst-mein-kuch-kaam-kariye-ensure-ease-of-compliance/articleshow/123730545.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 10:56:58 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SIDHARTHA AND SUROJIT GUPTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="576792" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123732587,imgsize-576792.cms"/></item><item><title>BCCI to hold AGM on Sept 28 to elect president, secretary, other office bearers</title><description><![CDATA[The BCCI's 94th Annual General Meeting is scheduled for September 28, 2025, in Mumbai, where key decisions will be made. The election of new office bearers, including President and Secretary, will be a primary focus, alongside financial reviews and committee appointments. The formation of the Women's Premier League Committee and discussions on sexual harassment prevention highlight the meeting's comprehensive agenda.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/bcci-to-hold-agm-on-sept-28-to-elect-president-secretary-other-office-bearers-clashes-with-asia-cup-final/articleshow/123734261.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/bcci-to-hold-agm-on-sept-28-to-elect-president-secretary-other-office-bearers-clashes-with-asia-cup-final/articleshow/123734261.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 16:17:57 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GAURAV GUPTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="36890" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123734405,imgsize-36890.cms"/></item><item><title>Golden kalash worth Rs 1.5 cr stolen from fest at Red Fort; FIR filed</title><description><![CDATA[A one kg gold kalash was stolen. The incident happened during a Jain Samaj festival near Red Fort. The festival was held at 15 August Park. Police received a complaint on September 3. Kotwali police station registered a case. The case is under Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita Section 303(2).]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/delhi/delhi-1-kg-gold-kalash-stolen-from-jain-fest-at-red-fort-fir-filed/articleshow/123731908.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/delhi/delhi-1-kg-gold-kalash-stolen-from-jain-fest-at-red-fort-fir-filed/articleshow/123731908.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 12:43:36 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>KHUSHI BHUTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1352912" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123731927,imgsize-1352912.cms"/></item><item><title>Will Trump block IT outsourcing to India? Aide says, 'Make call centers American again!'</title><description><![CDATA[Amid trade tensions as MAGA is increasing the pressure on the administration to stop programs that generate jobs in India, right-wing commentator Laura Loomer claimed Trump is considering blocking IT outsourcing to India. "Make Call Centers American Again!" Loomer posted on X. Loomer is not in administration or a policymaker but has gained prominence as Trump whisperer.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/is-trump-considering-blocking-it-outsourcing-india-aide-says-make-call-centers-american-again/articleshow/123733173.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/is-trump-considering-blocking-it-outsourcing-india-aide-says-make-call-centers-american-again/articleshow/123733173.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 06 Sep 2025 14:42:28 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="26056" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-123733181,imgsize-26056.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

      <description><![CDATA[The GST regime, as part of a rationalisation exercise, has been reduced from 4 slabs and other cesses to two primary slabs: the 5% and 18% slabs.       <description><![CDATA[In an exclusive interaction with CNBC-TV18, ITC Chairman Sanjiv Puri shared that the diversified conglomerate has committed ₹20,000 crore in fresh capex, with a sharp focus on expanding its FMCG, agriculture and paperboard operations.       <description><![CDATA[Millennials, Gen Z, and sustainability imperatives are reshaping consumer demand at a rapid pace, said ITC Chairman & MD Sanjiv Puri, adding that agility, resilient supply chains, and portfolio renewal are now critical business priorities. He also called the government’s GST rationalisation a “bold step” that will cut costs, boost consumption, and provide fresh momentum to FMCG growth.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[The GST Council’s two-day meet opened in New Delhi with rate rationalisation at the forefront. EY’s Saurabh Agarwal said rate cuts could curb evasion and broaden the tax base, limiting revenue loss to about ₹80,000 crore. Experts also flagged potential consumer relief if items like ACs, refrigerators and small vehicles move to lower slabs, though former CBIC Chairman Najib Shah cautioned against complex differential rates.]]></description>

      <title><![CDATA[New GST rates Highlights: Mukesh Ambani welcomes India’s second-generation GST reforms]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/gst-council-meet-live-updates-rate-cut-proposals-nirmala-sitharaman-two-slab-structure-taxation-reforms-liveblog-19663671.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[New GST rates Highlights: The GST Council has slashed tax rates on a wide range of household-use products, including hair oil, corn flakes, televisions, and personal life and health insurance policies, in a landmark reform to simplify the indirect tax system. The move reduces the current four-slab structure of 5%, 12%, 18%, and 28% to just two rates — 5% and 18% — while maintaining a special 40% rate for high-end cars, tobacco, and cigarettes.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Thu, 4 Sep 2025 22:35:41 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Anshul</dc:creator>
      <guid><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/gst-council-meet-live-updates-rate-cut-proposals-nirmala-sitharaman-two-slab-structure-taxation-reforms-liveblog-19663671.htm]]></guid>

      <media:content height="675" width="1200" medium="image" url="https://images.cnbctv18.com/uploads/2025/08/gst-calculation-2025-08-b5907cac42bc1ff93611e4087ff651b7.jpg"/>
    </item>

      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/pvr-inox-gaming-lounges-entertainment-dine-in-auditorium-expansion-19661556.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[PVR INOX is reinventing cinema with a “youthification” drive led by the Bijli family’s next generation. From India’s first dine-in auditorium to gaming lounges and AI-led foyers, the multiplex chain is piloting new entertainment formats in Bengaluru and Mumbai.       <description><![CDATA[CG Semi Private is investing over ₹7,600 crore (approximately $870 million) over the next five years to set up two state-of-the-art facilities, G1 and G2, in Sanand, Gujarat.       <description><![CDATA[Amazon India has announced 12 new fulfilment centres with a combined storage capacity of 8.6 million cubic feet, along with six new sort centres, ahead of the festive season.       <title><![CDATA[India's small businesses scramble to cushion blow from 50% US tariffs]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/business/india-small-businesses-scramble-to-cushion-blow-from-us-trump-tariffs-ws-l-19660502.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[A drop in exports to the US, which account for 2.2% of India's GDP, could impact economic growth by 0.6-0.8 percentage points over a 12-month period, economists say. The central bank forecasts growth at 6.5% in the current fiscal year.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[India’s real estate sector remains in a growth cycle despite a July dip in launches, says Gulam Zia, Senior Executive Director at Knight Frank India.
